parents.subject: LU-19545 ec: tight binding parity mirror to data mirror

commit.subject: LU-20093 lnet: restore local NI status on link up
commit.message:
LU-20093 lnet: restore local NI status on link up

Restore the exported NI status to "up" when clearing
the fatal link state for a fully healthy NI, push
the update to peers if the status changed. This avoids
local NI getting stuck with "down" status.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I34e672c555499bd8c6284a303f0e9447bb1bb867
